name: Baked Winter Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Select young, tender squash, wash well, and remove the tips from each end.
2. Cut the squash into small pieces, leaving the skin on unless it is very tough.
3. Melt the fat in a skillet until slightly brown.
4. Add the squash to the skillet, sprinkle with salt and pepper, and cover.
5. Cook at moderate heat for 10 or 15 minutes.
6. Remove the cover and cook for a few more minutes for the liquid to evaporate.
7. Serve hot.
